items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Chip Roy Lays Out How Senate Can Vote On SAVE Act Without Nuking Filibuster
items.description: 'We can move the legislation under CURRENT rules without 'nuking' the filibuster,' Roy pointed out.

items.title: Rooting Against Anti-American Olympians Is The Patriotic Thing To Do
items.description: U.S. athletes who use the Olympics as an avenue to thumb their noses at America deserve nothing but scorn and defeat.

items.title: Ed Crane Was Right About Free Speech And The Iraq War Years Before The Country Caught Up
items.description: Ed Crane had a gift for identifying moments when liberty required an unpopular defense — and history has a way of catching up to him.

items.title: Andrew Sullivan Is A Trump Supporter, But As With Most Things Political He Just Doesn’t Know It
items.description: Someone please tell Sullivan that what he wants from the Democrat Party is precisely what's offered by Trump's presidency.
